---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear summary of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap/click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See the issue

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Device / Browser

- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy S23, desktop)
- **OS:** (e.g., iOS 17, Android 14, macOS 14)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Safari, Chrome 120, Firefox)
- **App version:** (PWA installed or using website?)

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help — network conditions, time of day, specific parish, etc.
